programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A habitually lying little girl falsely accuses Kimble of chasing her through the woods and it puts his life in greater danger

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: Mike gets involved with helping foreign revolutionaries overthrow their dictator

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: Mike races against time to rescue a 12-year-old boy trapped in an underwater grotto rigged with explosives

programme.title: 12 OClock High
programme.desc: Gen Savage outfits some of his planes with bigger guns to try to reduce heavy losses but if a US senator remains unconvinced he could lose his command

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Determined to prove everyone wrong David decides to sneak into the basement of the old house where Barnabas keeps his coffin

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: David is so adamant there is a coffin in the basement of the old house that Burke and Dr Woodard decide to visit Barnabas and investigate

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Since they failed to find anything suspicious in the basement of the old house David tells Burke and Dr Woodard about the secret room in the mausoleum

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: A psychiatrist analyzes David Elizabeth informs Burke that theres a clause in an old family will which prevents her from selling him the house Dr Woodard decides to take another look at the mausoleum

programme.title: The One Eyed Soldiers
programme.desc: A doctors unexpected death in a central European republic sets a series of chilling events into motion

programme.title: Days of Jesse James
programme.desc: A bank robbery pulled off by the bank officials not the usual James gang

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: In this black comedy desperate real estate salesman Jake McElhaney tries to convince a magicians strange attractive twin daughters Frances and Priscilla Packard to sell their house

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Handsome audio engineer Eric Dunlap hired to install his strange top notch sound system with a mind of its own for an egotistical music conductor Kurt Hoffman but falls hard for Hoffmans beautiful neglected wife Veronica

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric confronts the werewolf Nicholas Remy and discovers that he is more formidable an opponent than Skorzeny ever was

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric comes to the aid of a blind woman with a talent for trick shooting he meets while working at a carnival when he learns that her fiancé plans on killing her for the insurance money

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: While investigating a series of bizarre murders Nick discovers the villain is a familiar face from his past

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A ventriloquists dummy becomes a vessel for evil when it comes to life and demands that its master commit murder

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance
programme.desc: Something or someone haunts a couples Robert Stack Vera Miles new home in the country

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Troy is captured while trying to make contact with the underground in a small village At stake is micro-film information about a new type of bomb the Germans have developed

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer decides to find a girl of his own after meeting Sergeant Carters girlfriend

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Everybody wants a piece of Gilligan and his newfound riches after he wins a three million dollar bet with Mr Howell

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways desperately try to find a new water source as they have completely exhausted their current water supply

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa reluctantly agrees to let Luke and Kate trade the McCoys family car plus 80 for a newer model but they regret their decision when they realize that he was genuinely attached to the ancient vehicle

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa and Lukes efforts to help Hassie win the attention of the most popular boy in school backfire but for unexpected reasons

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: The CONTROL agents are trapped on a KAOS island

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max enters the world of art looking for an art thief know as Bronzefinger

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: Pamela Gerard escapes from a mental institution and hitches a ride with BJ and the Bear

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Roger invests in Lady Linda a lovesick racehorse that wont run so its Mister Ed the love doctor to the rescue

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: George Burns is offering 25000 for a great new novelty act so Wilbur begs Mister Ed to talk to Mr Burns

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Carter receives a Dear John letter and wants to join the rest of the prisoners that escape and go home

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan tricks Klink into calling forth a bomber for study but it arrives with a complication - a German general familiar with Hogans style

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: A 3-Sister Singing Act is stranded on a deserted island and McHale and The 73 Crew have an ulterior motive when they volunteer for the rescue mission But the girls having had such experiences in the past are wise to their plan

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: While out on a recon mission McHale and the 73 Crew discover a deserted plantation which they turn into a party house where they can enjoy themselves when not on duty But their activities draw the attention of both the US Navy and the Japanese

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Determined to win re-election as Hazzard County Administrator at any cost Boss uses every dirty trick he knows in his campaign against the beautiful Thelma Claire TC Rogers the daughter of Boss old political foe

programme.title: Hercules 105
programme.desc: Hercules 105

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: An exhibition for the first arrival of the Taelons showcases different artifacts An artifact causes Liam to travel to an alternate time Zoor questions how Daan was able to rejoin the Commonality Zoor experiments with brain waves in order to cause aggression

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: As the aliens are losing the fight and dying off they decide to use spores to kill off all native life on Earth

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When Carla Jeffries uses Arcanes own scheming ways against him to take over his complex the doctor and Swamp Thing must work together to save both the swamp and Arcanes life

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When Arcane hires mercenaries to kill Swamp Thing the injured creature uses Anne Fisks equipment to try to heal himself temporarily becoming human again Tressa discovers his secret and tries to help him

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: Ships engineer Patrick Osgood believes he can obtain tiranuim to make a new heart for his sick wife Michelle from the catacombs of the moon using explosives The explosion which follows gives him a vision of the future in which the moon is destroyed by a fireball and a sudden heat storm strikes Though Helena is making a new heart for Michelle its repeated failures cause Osgood to become impatient Convinced he is his wifes only salvation he drags Michelle down into the catacombs giving Koenig a double task - to avoid the fireball and save the Osgoods

programme.title: Digital Man
programme.desc: An out-of-control robot is inadvertently set loose in a small community and a crack squad of soldiers are sent to hunt it down Gradually the members of the squad begin to suspect that some of them are robots

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne brings a bank robber into town to his old friend Sam A popular ranchers son is accidentally killed by Sam when a drunken mob tries to hang him Its up to Cheyenne to bring to justice the guilty party and free his friend

programme.desc: Stone and Keller suspect there is more to a string of college campus shootings than meets the eye

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force mixes dinner and danger at a crime czars private party Jack Wellman has arranged the deaths of four Government officials so he can fill the vacancies with men he controls

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Joe and Bill are assigned a task to find a purse snatcher They are surprised to learn it is a dog snatching the purses

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Out of the Cage reveals the private thoughts and emotions of an MMA fighter, the ambition that drives them and how they are affected when encountering defeat or facing triumph. Featuring Jared Tordoff at HK52

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Peel back the curtain to find out the goals and challenges of a Mixed Martial Arts fighter’s everyday life, and how it’s not much different than yours. Featuring Colton Boxell.

programme.title: Bleav in Panthers
programme.desc: Panthers great, Running Back Jonathan Stewart, is joined by Tobacco Road Sports Radio's Desmond Johnson, and Schuyler Callihan for weekly analysis on the Carolina Panthers!

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.title: The Ruffino & Joe Show
programme.desc: Blake Ruffino and Joe DeLeone join forces to talk about the latest in the SEC and College Football

programme.title: Bleav in Bengals
programme.desc: Solomon Wilcots hits the mics to talk Bengals football. After covering the field for the 'Who Dey?' nation

programme.title: Bleav In Commanders
programme.desc: Welcome to the Bleav in Commanders show hosted by former Washington WR Anthony Armstrong and Scott Jackson .We are proud to be a part of the Bleav Podcast Network! We provide insight on the Washington Commanders to the best fan base in the NFL! All content is for the fans, and by the fans. LET’S GO WASHINGTON!

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: See Ball Get Ball
programme.desc: Hosted by David Pollack, a College Football Hall of Famer, three-time First-Team All-American from the University of Georgia, and first-round NFL Draft pick, this podcast provides honest analysis of the most significant stories, matchups, and moments in the world of college football.

programme.title: Bleav in Giants
programme.desc: The broadcast team of commentator Bob Papa and New York Giants legend Carl Banks bring you weekly analysis on your New York Giants.

programme.title: Bleav in Chargers
programme.desc: The greatest fullback in Chargers history Lorenzo Neal hops on the mic with Chargers Play-By-Play Broadcaster Matt "Money" Smith to talk all things Jim Harbaugh, Justin Herbert, and the Los Angeles Chargers.

programme.title: Bleav in Texans
programme.desc: Bleav in Texans is your go-to podcast for everything Houston Texans, hosted by former NFL wide receiver Cecil Shorts III and former defensive tackle and sports radio host Seth Payne.

programme.title: Bleav in Buckeyes
programme.desc: Former Ohio State Football Players Chimdi Chekwa and Bryant Browning talk all things Buckeyes. THE #1 Ohio State Football Podcast out there talking Ryan Day, CJ Stroud, and the rest of the Grey and Scarlet.

programme.title: Bleav In Rams
programme.desc: Bleav in Rams brings you the Rams' insight and access that only they can. We provide in-depth analysis on Matthew Stafford, Cooper Kupp, Puka Nacua and the rest of the Los Angeles Rams squad hosted by Erin Coscarelli and Tyler Dragon

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: Bleav in Broncos
programme.desc: Denver Broncos insiders Patrick Chiotti and Bri Maestas bring you everything you need to know about the team at Mile High. Get insight and analysis on Bo Nix, Patrick Surtain II, Javonte Williams, and the entire Broncos squad. Tune in for recaps, previews, and guest interviews.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.
